# Security Policy Template

## Purpose

Use this template to describe how the project handles security reports
and expected responses.

## Scope

Keep the policy short and practical. It should help users know where to
report issues and what to expect next.

## Sections

### Supported versions

List the versions that receive security fixes.

### Reporting vulnerabilities

Describe where and how to report a security issue.

### Response expectations

Explain the approximate response window or the review queue behavior.

### Disclosure process

Describe how fixes are coordinated and how public disclosure happens.
